projectTruth.label: Project truth
projectTruth.remove: manual only; Phewsh never auto-removes project truth

layers.label: Intent skill
layers.ownership: Phewsh removes only unchanged receipt-owned copies; project-local overrides are user-owned.
layers.authority: Workflow instructions only; .intent/ remains project truth.
layers.boundary: Does not carry native transcripts or private model reasoning.

layers.label: Session hooks
layers.ownership: Marked hook entries are removable; breadcrumb history remains user-owned.
layers.authority: Injects a bounded project brief at SessionStart; records time, project, and cwd metadata at SessionEnd.
layers.boundary: Never records transcript content; hooks fail open.

layers.label: Native projections
layers.ownership: Only Phewsh-marked context blocks are refreshed or removed; human content is preserved.
layers.authority: Derived views of .intent/ for supported native project files.
layers.boundary: Does not project transcripts, private model reasoning, or editor buffers.

layers.label: Safety and receipt hooks
layers.ownership: Phewsh removes only its matching hook entries; unrelated settings are preserved.
layers.authority: Narrow pre-tool decision policy plus a redacted post-tool receipt.
layers.boundary: Local and deterministic; not a sandbox. Receipt captures tool and target, never arguments or content.

layers.label: MCP adapter
layers.remove: remove the printed phewsh entry from the client config
layers.ownership: Setup prints a manual client-config snippet; it does not write agent config.
layers.authority: Bounded context and task capability transport.
layers.boundary: Not project truth and no independent remote-execution authority.

layers.label: Ion worker
layers.ownership: Only deliberately registered local projects are exposed by the worker.
layers.authority: Same-machine, project-bound execution after a human explicitly claims work.
layers.boundary: Teammates cannot reach another machine's localhost; no cross-machine or VPS authority.

layers.label: Slack and Discord connectors
layers.ownership: No connector files or bot authority exist yet.
layers.authority: Planned request and notification transport around Ion.
layers.boundary: Not shipped; no bot auto-execution. Ion remains the canonical room.
